structured_payload_candidate.title: Fan Speed Reset in Heating and Cooling
structured_payload_candidate.section_title: Supply Fan Speed Control and Supply Air Temperature Set-Point Reset
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Fan speed is reset based on heating or cooling loop signal: from MaxHeatSpeed to MinSpeed for 100% to 50% heating, MinSpeed for 50% to 0% heating and deadband, MinSpeed for 0% to 25% cooling, reset from MinSpeed to MedSpeed for 25% to 50% cooling, MedSpeed for 50% to 75% cooling, and reset from MedSpeed to MaxCoolSpeed for 75% to 100% cooling.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Heating or cooling loop signal value
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Reset fan speed according to the specified ranges
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: a. For a heating-loop signal of 100% to 50%, fan speed is reset from MaxHeatSpeed to MinSpeed. b. For a heating-loop signal of 50% to 0%, fan speed setpoint is MinSpeed. c. In deadband, fan speed setpoint is MinSpeed. d. For a cooling-loop signal of 0% to 25%, fan speed is MinSpeed. e. For a cooling-loop signal of 25% to 50%, fan speed is reset from MinSpeed to MedSpeed. f. For a cooling-loop signal of 50% to 75%, fan speed is MedSpeed. g. For a cooling-loop signal of 75% to 100%, fan speed is reset from MedSpeed to MaxCoolSpeed.

evidence_quote: a. For a heating-loop signal of 100% to 50%, fan speed is reset from MaxHeatSpeed to MinSpeed. b. For a heating-loop signal of 50% to 0%, fan speed setpoint is MinSpeed. c. In deadband, fan speed setpoint is MinSpeed. d. For a cooling-loop signal of 0% to 25%, fan speed is MinSpeed. e. For a cooling-loop signal of 25% to 50%, fan speed is reset from MinSpeed to MedSpeed. f. For a cooling-loop signal of 50% to 75%, fan speed is MedSpeed. g. For a cooling-loop signal of 75% to 100%, fan speed is reset from MedSpeed to MaxCoolSpeed.
evidence_text: a. For a heating-loop signal of 100% to 50%, fan speed is reset from MaxHeatSpeed to MinSpeed. b. For a heating-loop signal of 50% to 0%, fan speed setpoint is MinSpeed. c. In deadband, fan speed setpoint is MinSpeed. d. For a cooling-loop signal of 0% to 25%, fan speed is MinSpeed. e. For a cooling-loop signal of 25% to 50%, fan speed is reset from MinSpeed to MedSpeed. f. For a cooling-loop signal of 50% to 75%, fan speed is MedSpeed. g. For a cooling-loop signal of 75% to 100%, fan speed is reset from MedSpeed to MaxCoolSpeed.

structured_payload_candidate.title: SATsp Reset in Heating and Cooling
structured_payload_candidate.section_title: Supply Fan Speed Control and Supply Air Temperature Set-Point Reset
structured_payload_candidate.summary: SATsp is reset based on heating or cooling loop signal: Heat_SAT for 100% to 50% heating, reset from Heat_SAT to deadband value for 50% to 0% heating, deadband value in deadband, reset from deadband to Cool_SAT minus 1°C for 0% to 25% cooling, unchanged for 25% to 50% cooling, Cool_SAT minus 1°C for 50% to 75% cooling, unchanged for 75% to 100% cooling.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Heating or cooling loop signal value
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Reset SATsp according to the specified ranges
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: h. For a heating-loop signal of 100% to 50%, SATsp is Heat_SAT. i. For a heating-loop signal of 50% to 0%, SATsp is reset from Heat_SAT to the deadband value. j. In deadband, SATsp is the deadband value. k. For a cooling-loop signal of 0% to 25%, SATsp is reset from the deadband value to Cool_SAT minus 1°C (2°F), while SATsp-C is the deadband value. l. For a cooling-loop signal of 25% to 50%, SATsp and SATsp-C are unchanged. m. For a cooling-loop signal of 50% to 75%, SATsp remains at Cool_SAT minus 1°C (2°F), SATsp-C is reset from the deadband value to Cool_SAT. n. For a cooling-loop signal of 75% to 100%, SATsp and SATsp-C are unchanged.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Freeze Protection Stage 1
structured_payload_candidate.summary: If SAT drops below 4°C (40°F) for 5 minutes, send two or more heating hot-water plant requests, override OA damper to minimum position, and modulate heating coil to maintain SAT of at least 6°C (42°F). Disable when SAT rises above 7°C (45°F) for 5 minutes.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Send heating plant requests, set OA damper to minimum, modulate heating coil to maintain SAT ≥ 6°C; disable when SAT > 7°C for 5 minutes
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: If the supply air temperature drops below 4°C (40°F) for 5 minutes, send two (or more, as required to ensure that heating plant is active) heating hot-water plant requests, override the outdoor air damper to the minimum position, and modulate the heating coil to maintain a supply air temperature of at least 6°C (42°F). Disable this function when supply air temperature rises above 7°C (45°F) for 5 minutes.

evidence_quote: If the supply air temperature drops below 4°C (40°F) for 5 minutes, send two (or more, as required to ensure that heating plant is active) heating hot-water plant requests, override the outdoor air damper to the minimum position, and modulate the heating coil to maintain a supply air temperature of at least 6°C (42°F). Disable this function when supply air temperature rises above 7°C (45°F) for 5 minutes.
evidence_text: If the supply air temperature drops below 4°C (40°F) for 5 minutes, send two (or more, as required to ensure that heating plant is active) heating hot-water plant requests, override the outdoor air damper to the minimum position, and modulate the heating coil to maintain a supply air temperature of at least 6°C (42°F). Disable this function when supply air temperature rises above 7°C (45°F) for 5 minutes.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Freeze Protection Stage 2
structured_payload_candidate.summary: If SAT drops below 3°C (38°F) for 5 minutes, fully close both economizer and minimum OA dampers for 1 hour and set a Level 3 alarm. After 1 hour, resume minimum OA ventilation and enter Stage 1.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Close OA dampers for 1 hour, set Level 3 alarm; after 1 hour, resume minimum OA and enter Stage 1
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: If the supply air temperature drops below 3°C (38°F) for 5 minutes, fully close both the economizer damper and the minimum outdoor air damper for 1 hour and set a Level 3 alarm noting that minimum ventilation was interrupted. After 1 hour, the unit shall resume minimum outdoor air ventilation and enter the previous stage of freeze protection (see Section 5.18.11.1).

structured_payload_candidate.title: Freeze Protection Stage 3
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Upon signal from freeze-stat or if SAT drops below 3°C for 15 minutes or below 1°C for 5 minutes, shut down supply and return/relief fans, close OA damper, set cooling coil valve to 100%, energize CHW pump system, send heating plant requests, modulate heating coil to maintain SAT or MAT at 27°C (80°F), and set Level 2 alarm. Shutdown remains until reset by software switch.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Freeze-stat signal, or SAT < 3°C for 15 minutes, or SAT < 1°C for 5 minutes
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Shut down fans, close OA damper, open cooling coil valve, energize CHW pumps, send heating requests, modulate heating coil to 27°C, set Level 2 alarm; require software reset
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: Upon signal from the freeze-stat (if installed), or if supply air temperature drops below 3°C (38°F) for 15 minutes or below 1°C (34°F) for 5 minutes, shut down supply and return/relief fan(s), close outdoor air damper, make the minimum cooling-coil valve position 100%, and energize the CHW pump system. Send two (or more, as required to ensure that heating plant is active) heating hot-water plant requests, modulate the heating coil to maintain the higher of the supply air temperature or the mixed air temperature at 27°C (80°F), and set a Level 2 alarm indicating the unit is shut down by freeze protection. If a freeze protection shutdown is triggered by a low air temperature sensor reading, it shall remain in effect until it is reset by a software switch from the operator's workstation.

evidence_quote: 5.18.11.3.  Upon signal from the freeze -stat (if installed), or if supply air temperature dro ps below 3°C (38°F)

structured_payload_candidate.title: Fan Status Mismatch Alarm
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Fan alarm is indicated by the status being different from the command for a period of 15 seconds. Commanded ON, status OFF: Level 2. Commanded OFF, status ON: Level 4.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Status differs from command for 15 seconds
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Generate Level 2 alarm if commanded ON but status OFF; Level 4 if commanded OFF but status ON

structured_payload_candidate.title: Filter Pressure Drop Alarm
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Filter pressure drop exceeds the larger of the alarm limit or 12.5 Pa (0.05”) for 10 minutes when fan speed exceeds 20% of MaxCoolSpeed: Level 4. Alarm limit varies with fan speed as DPx = DP100 * (x)^1.4.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Filter DP > max(alarm limit, 12.5 Pa) for 10 minutes and fan speed > 20% MaxCoolSpeed
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Generate Level 4 alarm; alarm limit calculated as DP100 * (fan speed fraction)^1.4
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: Filter pressure drop exceeds the larger of the alarm limit or 12.5 Pa (0.05”) for 10 minutes when fan speed exceeds 20% of MaxCoolSpeed: Level 4. The alarm limit shall vary with fan speed as follows: DPx = DP100 * (x)^1.4 where DP100 is the high limit pressure drop at design airflow and DPx is the high limit at the current fan speed x (expressed as a fraction).

structured_payload_candidate.title: AFDD Fault Condition FC#2
structured_payload_candidate.summary: FC#2: MAT too low; should be between OAT and RAT. Equation: MAT_avg + ε_MAT < min[(RAT_avg - ε_RAT), (OAT_avg - ε_OAT)]. Applies to OS#1–#5.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Report fault with possible diagnoses: RAT, MAT, or OAT sensor error

structured_payload_candidate.title: AFDD Evaluation Suspension Conditions
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Evaluation of fault conditions shall be suspended when AHU is not operating and for a period of ModeDelay minutes following a change in mode of any Zone Group served by the AHU.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: AHU not operating or mode change
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Suspend fault condition evaluation

structured_payload_candidate.title: Testing/Commissioning Overrides for Valves
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Provide software switches to force HW valve full open/closed and CHW valve full open/closed, interlocked to plant level.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Provide software switches to force valves open/closed
structured_payload_candidate.commissioning_check: Verify that software switches can force HW and CHW valves full open and full closed
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: Provide software switches that interlock to a CHW and hot-water plant level to a. force HW valve full open if there is a hot-water coil, b. force HW valve full closed if there is a hot-water coil, c. force CHW valve full open if there is a CHW coil, and d. force CHW valve full closed if there is a CHW coil.

evidence_quote: Provide software switches that interlock to a CHW and hot-water plant level to a. force HW valve full open if there is a hot-water coil, b. force HW valve full closed if there is a hot-water coil, c. force CHW valve full open if there is a CHW coil, and d. force CHW valve full closed if there is a CHW coil.
evidence_text: Provide software switches that interlock to a CHW and hot-water plant level to a. force HW valve full open if there is a hot-water coil, b. force HW valve full closed if there is a hot-water coil, c. force CHW valve full open if there is a CHW coil, and d. force CHW valve full closed if there is a CHW coil.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Chilled-Water Reset Requests
structured_payload_candidate.summary: If SAT exceeds SATsp-C by 3°C for 2 minutes, send 3 requests. Else if by 2°C for 2 minutes, send 2 requests. Else if CHW valve > 95%, send 1 request until valve < 85%. Else send 0 requests.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: SAT vs SATsp-C and CHW valve position
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Send appropriate number of chilled-water reset requests
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: a. If the supply air temperature exceeds SATsp-C by 3°C (5°F) for 2 minutes, send 3 requests. b. Else if the supply air temperature exceeds SATsp-C by 2°C (3°F) for 2 minutes, send 2 requests. c. Else if the CHW valve position is greater than 95%, send 1 request until the CHW valve position is less than 85%. d. Else if the CHW valve position is less than 95%, send 0 requests.

evidence_text: 5.18.15.1.  Chilled -Water Reset Requests
